debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ
integrable_prod_inner_X :
  ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)) μ
EvenIndex : (Fin m → ι × ι) → Prop := fun I => ∀ i ∈ A, Even ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)
⊢ ∑ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A with EvenIndex I,
      ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) ∂μ =
    ∑ w ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) with ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i, ↑(multinomial A w) * ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ w i ∂μ

          (by
            intro I hI
            refine ⟨?_, ?_, rfl⟩
            · refine mem_filter.2 ?_
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
              ·
                -- membership in `piAntidiag` from the sum of counts
                refine mem_piAntidiag.2 ?_
                constructor
                · intro i hi
                  exact Nat.zero_le _
                ·
                  have hI' : I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m := (mem_filter.1 hI).1
                  have hmaps₁ : ∀ k, (I k).1 ∈ A := by
                    intro k
                    have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := (mem_piFinset.1 hI').1 k
                    exact (mem_product.1 this).1
                  have hmaps₂ : ∀ k, (I k).2 ∈ A := by
                    intro k
                    have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := (mem_piFinset.1 hI').1 k
                    exact (mem_product.1 this).2
                  have hsum :

                    calc

                        simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
                      _ = m + m := by
                        congr 1
                        · simpa using card_eq_sum_card_fiberwise hmaps₁
                        · simpa using card_eq_sum_card_fiberwise hmaps₂
                      _ = 2 * m := by
                        ring
                  simpa [two_mul] using hsum

classical
      simpa [Finset.mul_sum] using
        (Finset.sum_bij
          (fun I hI => fun i => ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card))
          (by
            intro I hI
            have hI' : I ∈ A ×ˢ A ^^ m := by
              simpa [A ^^ m, Finset.mem_filter] using hI.1
            have hmem : ∀ i, (fun i => ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)) i ≠ 0 → i ∈ A := by
              intro i hi
              have : ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) ≠ 0 := hi
              have : {k | (I k).1 = i}.card ≠ 0 ∨ {k | (I k).2 = i}.card ≠ 0 := by
                exact Nat.add_ne_zero.mp this
              rcases this with h₁ | h₂
              · have : ∃ k, (I k).1 = i := by
                  simpa [Finset.card_ne_zero, Finset.Nonempty] using h₁
                rcases this with ⟨k, hk⟩
                have hkA : (I k).1 ∈ A := (by
                  have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                    simpa [A ^^ m, Fintype.mem_piFinset] using hI'
                  simpa [Finset.mem_product] using this).1
                simpa [hk] using hkA
              · have : ∃ k, (I k).2 = i := by
                  simpa [Finset.card_ne_zero, Finset.Nonempty] using h₂
                rcases this with ⟨k, hk⟩
                have hkA : (I k).2 ∈ A := (by
                  have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                    simpa [A ^^ m, Fintype.mem_piFinset] using hI'
                  simpa [Finset.mem_product] using this).2
                simpa [hk] using hkA
            have hsum :
                (∑ i in A, ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)) = 2 * m := by
              have hsum1 : (∑ i in A, {k | (I k).1 = i}.card) = m := by
                simpa [A ^^ m, Fintype.card_fin] using
                  (Finset.card_eq_sum_ones (s := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin m))).trans ?_)
              ·
                have hsum2 : (∑ i in A, {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) = m := by
                  simpa [A ^^ m, Fintype.card_fin] using
                    (Finset.card_eq_sum_ones (s := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin m))).trans ?_)
                ·
                  simpa [Finset.sum_add_distrib, two_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm,
                    hsum1, hsum2] using congrArg (fun x => x) rfl
              all_goals
                classical
                refine (Finset.sum_bij (fun k _ => (I k).1) (fun k _ => ?_) (fun a ha => ?_)
                  (fun k₁ _ k₂ _ h => ?_) (fun i hi => ?_))?_
                ·
                  have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                    have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                      have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                        have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                          have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                            have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
                              sorry
                            exact this
                          exact this
                        exact this
                      exact this
                    exact this
                  simpa [Finset.mem_product] using this
                ·
                  exact False.elim (by simpa using ha)
                ·
                  exact False.elim (by simpa using h)
                ·
                  exact False.elim (by simpa using hi)
                ·
                  simp
            have hwA : (fun i => ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)) ∈
                piAntidiag A (2 * m) := by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
              · intro i hi
                exact hmem i hi
              · simpa [hsum]
            have hdiv : ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ (fun i => ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)) i :=
              by
                intro i hi
                have : EvenIndex I := by simpa [Finset.mem_filter] using hI.2
                simpa [Even] using (this i hi)
            exact by
              refine Finset.mem_filter.2 ?_
              exact ⟨hwA, hdiv⟩)
          (by
            intro I hI
            rfl)
          (by
            intro I₁ hI₁ I₂ hI₂ h
            have : I₁ = I₂ := by
              ext k <;> have := congrArg (fun w => w (I₁ k).1) h <;> simp at this
              · sorry
              · sorry
            simpa [this])
          (by
            intro w hw
            classical
            refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
            ·
              classical
              choose I hI using (exists_family_eq_card_eq_of_piAntidiag hw.1)
              exact I
            ·
              simp [Finset.mem_filter] at hw
              simp [Finset.mem_filter, hw] 
            ·
              simp))
